title: One Piece Hands Yet Another Upgrade to a Straw Hat (And It’s Still Not Usopp)
content: One Piece ’s manga continues to explore the Elbaph arc, deepening its lore, and in its latest chapter, it gives another Straw Hat an upgrade and importance that isn’t Usopp. The Sniper of the Straw Hats was expected to be one of the most prominent characters in this arc, given how Usopp has always revered the giants…
author: ComicBook

title: North American Anime & Manga Releases for April
content: Here are the North American anime, manga, and light novel releases for April. Week 1: April 7 - 13 Anime Releases • Captain Tsubasa (2018) DVD • Captain Tsubasa Season 2: Junior Youth-hen (Captain Tsubasa: Junior Youth Arc) DVD • Isekai Nonbiri Nouka (Farming Life in Another World) Blu-ray [Limited Edition, SteelBook]…
author: MyAnimeList

title: The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for The Throne Anime Reveals Cast, Staff, July TV Debut
content: The official website for the anime of Tanba and Yuunagi 's The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for The Throne ( Saikyō Degarashi Ōji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi: Munō o Enjiru SS-Rank Ōji wa Kōi Keishō-sen o Kage kara Shihai Suru ) light novel series opened on Tuesday and announced its television format and July premiere.
author: ANN

title: Love Live! Hasunosora Gets TV Anime in January 2027
content: Love Live! Hasunosora Girls’ High School Idol Club is getting a TV anime set to debut in January 2027. Three new characters have also been introduced: • Maika • Aoi • Mion The previously announced movie of the group is set to premiere on May 8, 2026.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Summer 2026 Premiere
content: Production company Kadokawa opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Tanba 's Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi: Munou wo Enjiru SS Rank Ouji wa Koui Keishousen wo Kage kara Shihai suru ( The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for the Throne ) light novel on Tuesday, revealing the main…
author: MyAnimeList

title: I Want to End This Love Game Anime's Promo Video Previews Opening Theme Song
content: The staff for the television anime of Yūki Dōmoto 's I Want to End This Love Game ( Aishiteru Game o Owarasetai ) manga streamed a promotional video and commercial on Tuesday, and they preview CHICO with Honeyworks ' opening theme song "Kimi no Sei de Aishiteru" (It's Your Fault that I Love You).
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Creator’s Final Film Gets a Major Streaming Update in April
content: Even four decades after its debut in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine, Akira Toriyama’s Dragon Ball remains one of the most influential anime and manga franchises of all time. The series has popularized countless Shonen tropes and continues to inspire several creators to this day.
author: ComicBook

title: 3 Major Anime Returning This Week That You Shouldn’t Miss
content: Starting this week, the Spring 2026 anime season has officially begun, bringing with it a fresh weekly schedule packed with newly serialized titles. Winter 2026 stood out as one of the strongest seasons in recent years, featuring the return of major anime while several new debuts also captured attention.
author: ComicBook

title: Is My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 3 Happening? Everything We Know So Far
content: My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2 has officially come to a close, which means fans of the shonen franchise will be without new content for a while — at least until My Hero Academia ‘s special epilogue episode on May 2, and then after that as well.
author: ComicBook

title: 3 New Shonen Jump April 2026 Series First Looks Revealed (& What They Might Replace)
content: Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine has announced that there are three new series making their debuts through the course of Apri l, and has revealed the first looks at what to expect from these new Spring releases.
author: ComicBook
